classes.reasoning: This is a per-patient, per-visit data capture form labeled 'eCRF -- CYCLE 5 DAY 1 / TUMOUR ASSESSMENT VISIT' containing structured clinical data fields (vital signs, ECOG PS, tumour assessment, study drug dispensing, adverse events) with patient identifier BRC471-DE01-001, data entry and verification signatures, and investigator signature block.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) capturing clinical data for patient BRC471-DE01-001 at Cycle 5 Day 1 / Tumour Assessment Visit on 03 December 2023. The form documents vital signs, ECOG performance status, tumour assessment per RECIST v1.1 showing confirmed partial response, study drug dispensing details, and ongoing adverse events, with data entry by M.Weber, verification by Dr. H. Schmidt, and investigator signature.
